name: Crunchy Almond Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a 15" x 10" rimmed baking sheet with graham wafers in a single layer (no gaps on the baking sheet).
3. Sprinkle 1 cup almonds over the graham crackers.
4. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
5. Stir in brown sugar. Bring to a boil; reduce heat to medium-low and cook, stirring about 3 minutes (do not cook longer or syrup will become harder).
6. Pour mixture over wafers and spread evenly.
7. Sprinkle remaining almonds on top.
8. Bake in the preheated oven at 375°F for about 8 minutes or until bubbly all over.
9. Place baking sheet on a wire rack and cool for 5 minutes.
10. Cut into bars. Transfer to a wire rack and cool completely.
Makes: 4 DOZEN
